---
name: Adapter Request
about: Request or propose a new application adapter
title: "[Adapter] "
labels: adapter
assignees: ''
---

**Application**
Which application should CEL support? (e.g. SAP GUI, Bloomberg Terminal, MetaTrader)

**Platform**
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux

**Available interfaces**
What programmatic interfaces does this application expose?
- [ ] Accessibility API (UIA / AXUIElement)
- [ ] Native API (COM, scripting, SDK)
- [ ] None (vision-only)
- [ ] Unknown

**Use case**
What workflow would you automate with this adapter?

**Additional context**
Links to documentation, API references, or examples.
